3.name: The Third Australian General Hospital Handicap

1.comments: Got back worse than midfield running on ok late into fifth 2.7L Kindgarten Group 3 over 1100m Soft 7. Enjoyed a nice run on the pace and raced clear to victory 1.4L at Warwick Farm 2Yf Mdn over 1200m.

A 150k purchase from the Gold Coast Magic Millions Yearling Sale. Sire was a G3 juvenile  winner before winning the G1 Coolmore Stud Stakes. Dam has produced all winners to race.  Super when winning recent trial.
Very comfortable win 2.6L at Royal Randwick 2Y-Bt 16thMar2026 over 740m. Held off rivals for a soft win 1.8L at Hawkesbury 2Y Hcp over 1100m.
Just missed when finished a close second 0.5L at Beaumont Newcastle 2Y-Bt 17thMar2026 over 850m. Settled on pace and proved too good winning 1.6L at Gosford Mid 2Y Mdn over 1000m.
Worked to sit on pace and kicked clear late, solid win 1.6L at Newcastle Mdn over 900m.  Worked to the line well in a recent trial and looks set to run a big race here.

A 600k purchase from the Gold Coast Magic Millions Yearling Sale. By 3-time Champion  Sire of Australia from a G3 winning daughter of So You Think. Caught the eye steaming  down the outside late into second in a trial.

A 230k purchase from Inglis Melbourne Premier Sale. Sire a G2 winning juvenile that was  runner-up at G1 level on three occasions. Dam was a winner at G3 level and has produced a  city winner. Great recent trial win.
Settled a long way back in transit displaying best work very late for fifth 2.8L at Newcastle Max Lees over 900m. Midfield, no impact 6L at Rosehill Gardens 2Y Hcp over 1100m.

An 850k Gold Coast Magic Millions Yearling Sale purchased by a 4-time Champion Sire of  Australia in Snitzel. Dam won three times and is from the same family as G1 winner Mighty  Boss. Pushed along when third in recent trial.

A 1.8m purchase from the Inglis Easter Yearling Sale. By 3-time Champion  Sire of Australia out of a half-sister to 4-time Champion Australian Racehorse of the year in  Winx. Sat off speed and worked well to the line in two trials.

A 350k purchase from the Gold Coast Magic Millions Yearling Sale. By the sire of recent  Golden Slipper winner, Guest House out of a multiple G1 placegetter. Hit the line well when  asked when third in a recent trial.

An 800k purchase from the Gold Coast Magic Millions Yearling Sale. By 3-time Champion  Sire of Australia from a stakes winning mare. He's from the same family as G3 winner The  Pamplemousse. Led and solid when second in a trial.

Sat wide on debut but found when asked, looked good 1.7L at Canterbury 2Y Mdn over  1100m. Sat on speed in a recent trial and looked very good winning there. Needs luck from  the gate but has ability.

A 250k purchase from Inglis Easter Yearling Sale. Sire a European dual G1 winning  undefeated 2YO. From a full sister to multiple G1 winner Shoals. Sat off speed and did her  best work through the line when fourth in a trial.
Won narrowly 0.1L at Rosehill Gardens 2Y-Bt 2ndApr2026 over 900m. Raced behind the leaders and ran on nicely for the runner-up spot 1.8L at Hawkesbury 2Y Hcp over 1100m.

2.comments: Positioned behind the front-runners and ran on hard to win 0.5L at Sandown Hillside Bm66 over 1300m. Got a long way back in transit but produced a fast finishing second 2L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1400m. Down in grade and best late last time.

Fought off rivals to win after settling just off the speed 0.7L at Warwick Farm Super 3Y Mdn-Sw over 1300m Soft 6. Fourth 4.6L at Rosehill Gardens Open-Bt 17thApr2026 over 1030m. Excellent super maiden win on debut. Stepping up sharply.

Settled on pace and proved far too good winning in classy fashion 10L at Beaumont Newcastle Bm58 over 1350m. Loomed as the winner and got to the lead when it mattered most 0.6L at Hawkesbury 3&4Y Bm72 over 1500m. In form and well placed.

Led, challenged but showed great courage to hold on for the win 0.3L at Gosford Bm64 over 1600m. Nicely positioned in the race and tried hard when running on into third 2.1L at Newcastle Bm68 over 1250m.
Ran on ok for sixth after settling midfield in transit 2.6L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1300m. Settled well back in the running but stormed home to win on the line 0.1L at Hawkesbury F&M Bm64 over 1400m.

Settled on the speed and burst clear to win softly 3L at Muswellbrook Bm58 over 1280m Soft 5. Lost Rider during the running S/Pacific Listed over 1400m. Won first two before losing rider in LISTED grade last time,can consider.

Tenacious run after going forward in transit to hold third 1.2L at Geelong Bm70. Held position to the line for second after settling with the leaders 1.5L at Warwick Farm F&M Bm72 over 1300m. Can be on speed and perform second-up.

Under pressure to make ground and not competitive 38.3L Hurry Harriet S Listed over 1911m. Sixth 4.3L Rosemary Stks Listed over 1609m. Euro import at her Australian debut, Has won both jump outs so can consider.

Sixth 13.8L at Curragh 3Y Hcp over 2011m Soft. Fought off rival in good hit out to win 0.2L at Dundalk Hcp over 1609m Synthetic. Euro import having his Australian debut, may need further but must watch.

Gutsy effort to hold off rivals to win when hitting the lead 0.9L at Hawkesbury Cl1 over 1300m Soft 5. Sent forward and gave backers a sight before weakening into sixth 1.5L at Wyong F&M Bm72 over 1350m Soft 6.

Sat behind the leaders and appeared to have every chance 3.4L B/Day Card Group 3 over 1200m Soft 6. Gave a sight out in front before being reeled in slowly but surely 0.6L at Hawkesbury Bm78 over 1300m. Easier task but poorly drawn.

Hit the line hard for second despite finding one better on the day 1.5L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72 over 1600m. Really got going when the race was over after positioned a long way back 2L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1900m. Well placed.

Went forward and looked a winning chance before fading late fifth 1.9L at Caulfield Vgold Distaff over 1400m. Driven to the lead but was run down late when second 0.3L at Sportsbet Sandown Lakeside Bm66 over 1400m.

Stalked the speed, under the whip to make ground struggling into fifth 5.3L Spring Stk Group 3 over 1600m. Had the right run on the pace and made it count to win 0.6L at Gosford Mid Bm68 over 1200m. Second-up after good win resuming.

Held on for a fighting win after leading for home 0.7L at Canterbury Park 3Y Bm64 over 1200m. Pressed to make a move but failed to make any impression on rivals 5.4L P J Bell Group 3 over 1200m. Found the G3 company too tough last time.

Game performance for third despite the margin 2.2L at Newcastle (GB) F&M Nov Sw over 2050m Synthetic. Got the bob in on the line winning 0.1L at Kempton Park F&M Mdn Sw over 2211m Synthetic. Looking for further later on.

3.comments: Box seated and burst to the front winning effortlessly 2.3L at Gosford Prov Bm68 over  1000m. Had right run, others sprinted better but great effort 2L P J Bell G3 over 1200m. Drop  in grade and how she maps has her being hard to beat.

Wide no cover throughout and kept finding 0.1L at Warwick Farm F&M Bm72 over 1100m.  Widest horse throughout, never asked in straight, forgive 22.8L P J Bell G3 over 1200m.  Drops in weight from that run and has trialled well since.
Sat just behind the leaders and held on to win 0.1L at Gosford Mid Cl1 over 1200m. Found the lead early but was run down for second 1.9L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72 over 1100m.

Fought hard over the final stages for third after sitting behind leaders 0.7L at Wyong Bm78 over 1000m Soft 6. Weakened out of the race after doing a lot of chasing 3.7L P J Bell Group 3 over 1200m Soft 7. Should find this easier.

Got a long way back in transit and showed best work late when fourth 4.3L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72 over 1000m. Flew to the line in an impressive gallop for second but got too far back 1L at Rosehill Gardens Midway 5Y+ Bm72 over 1200m.
Back, worked home well 2.8L Twilight Glow Listed over 1400m Soft 6. Hardly sighted and under heavy pressure to make ground from settling position 13.4L P J Bell Group 3 over 1200m Soft 7. Second-up.

Had the right run on the pace and made it count to win narrowly 0.3L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm78 over 1550m. Never in contention after settling a long way back 3.3L Belle Turf Group 3 over 1600m. Has won first-up, consider.

Ridden forward and just failed to get the bob in when second behind subsequent stakes  winner 0.2L at Kembla Grange F&M Bm78 over 1200m. Went quickly, nailed late 0.9L at  Rosehill Bm72 over 1100m. Fitter second up, big chance here.

Set the pace and loomed as a chance before tiring into fourth 2.8L at Royal Randwick Highway Cl3sw over 1000m Soft 5. Held off rivals for a soft win 1.9L at Hawkesbury 4Y+ Mares Bm72 over 1100m. Second-up.

Up outside the speed gave everything tiring for fifth place 3.8L at Royal Randwick F&M Bm78 over 1300m Soft 7. Applied pressure to the leader but was under the pump to hold position 4.4L at Newcastle F&M Bm78 over 1400m.

Excellent effort to get the upper hand on the line to win after leading 0.1L at Warwick Farm F&M Bm72 over 1100m Soft 7. Made up some ground when the race was over into sixth 1.8L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1000m Soft 5.

Dominant, tough win wide no cover the trip 4.3L at Caulfield Bm70 over 1440m. Perhaps an  end of prep run 1.8L Hkj Club Stakes G3 over 1400m. Trials have been solid, may want a bit  more ground but she's a talent.

Encouraging run for fifth beating some tired horse late after getting well back 3.3L at Ballarat Bm84 over 2000m Soft 6. Ridden back, under pump long way out, slow recov 16.7L Pakenham Cup Listed over 2500m. Is a first-up winner.

Had few excuses after finding a nice trail midfield 6.9L at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 over 1300m. Set a big task to run on from worse than midfield but hit the line hard 0.8L at Gosford F&M Bm64 over 1200m. Warrants respect with second-up stats.

4.comments: Set sail for home in front but was overhauled quickly for sixth 1.7L at Rosehill Bm78 over 1200m. Gutsy effort to hold off rivals to win when hitting the lead 0.8L at Kembla Grange Bm78 over 1400m Heavy 8. Should perform well resuming.

Won by the barest of margins after sitting off the pace 0.2L at Gosford Provmid Champ over 1200m Soft 5. Ran out of energy after leading and giving followers a gallant effort 6.3L at Royal Randwick Prov-Mid Champ over 1400m.

Stormed home the final part of the race with all guns blazing winning 3L at Newcastle Cg&E Bm64 over 1200m. Came with a burst to overhaul rivals to win 1.7L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1200m. Winning by huge margins both starts this prep.

Looked to find a nice spot in-running however was found wanting 4.5L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1400m. Too far back in the running to be a serious threat 3.3L at Warwick Farm Cg&E Bm72 over 1200m. Could improve second-up.

Settled midfield and appeared to have every chance to challenge 2.5L at Canberra Open over 1400m Soft 6. Positioned midfield and had chance to run on but ultimately outclassed 3.3L at Rosehill Gardens Bm94 over 1400m. Can run well first-up.

Midfield, stuck to task, lame post race 4L Pago Pago Group 3 over 1200m. Shifted back near last, couldn't go when asked 6.1L Heritage Listed over 1100m. Resuming after contesting some quality races last prep, quiet at trials but keep safe.
Pressed on to the lead however was under enormous pressure to hold spot 3.4L at Royal Randwick Bm88 over 1400m. Disappointed after finding a nice seat on the pace 4.9L at Eagle Farm Hcp over 1400m.

Too far back in the running to be a serious threat 6.6L at Wyong Bm78 over 1350m Soft 6. Settled a long way back and grew wings late to just miss out on the major prize 0.9L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1400m Soft 5.

Weakened out of the race after doing a lot of chasing 5.9L at Scone Nrth Wild Card over 1400m Soft 5. Got the better of rivals late to win after running on well from fifth 0.9L at Rosehill Gardens Bm72 over 1100m Soft 6.

Tenacious run after going forward in transit and nice effort to hold third 1.8L at Canterbury Park Bm78 over 1100m. Won nicely at the finish after settling midfield 0.4L at Canterbury Park 5Y+ Bm78 over 1250m. Resuming in suitable grade.

Got back worse than midfield running on ok late into fifth 2.5L at Nowra Nowra Cup Mbm79 over 1600m Soft 7. Poised to bounce at the 400m however didn't have a lot left to give 3.2L at Hawkesbury Bm78 over 1300m.

Held on for a fighting win after leading for home 1L at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw over 1200m. Sat outside the pace and shot clear over the final stages to win 1.5L at Kensington Bm78 over 1150m Soft 7. Flying of late and at his best trip.

Over raced early on, huge run considering 2.7L Stutt Stk Group 2 over 1600m. On pace, keen early, kicked for home, stuck on 3.6L Caul Guineas Group 1 over 1600m. Resuming at very suitable grade and trip. Early speed the key to winning.

5.comments: Went very quick and got chased down 2.5L at Warwick Farm Super Mdn-Sw over 1100m.  Led, kicked strongly and won well 0.6L at Rosehill 3Y+Mdn-Sw over 1100m Soft 6. No  weight here and maps to get control, hard to run down.

Gutsy effort to hold off rivals to win when hitting the lead 0.2L at Wyong Super Mdn-Sw over 1100m. Ran home strongly to win on the line after sitting behind the leaders 0L at Newcastle Cl1 over 900m. Second-up.

Held on for a fighting win after leading for home 1L at Rosehill Gardens Cg&E Mdn-Sw over 1200m. Positioned ready to pounce and took over late for an easy win 1.5L at Kensington Bm78 over 1150m Soft 7.

Made up some ground into fourth after settling behind the speed 3.8L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1000m Soft 7. Tracked into the race just behind the pace and wasn't beaten that far 3L at Rosehill Gardens Bm72 over 1100m Soft 6.
Kicked clear for the easiest of wins after leading 2.4L at Royal Randwick Bm78 over 1100m Soft 7. Midfield, no influence 10.8L Starlight Listed over 1100m. Has won first-up, consider.

Tried very hard under vigorous riding from midfield but outclassed sixth 3.6L at Rosehill Gardens Bm94 over 1100m. Held position strongly to the line but was never a serious threat 2.1L at Kembla Grange Lillye - Bm94 over 1200m Soft 7. Proven here at this track/distance.

Determined win after sitting close to the lead in transit 0.3L at Wyong Prov Bm68 over 1200m. Went forward to sit just off the leaders but served up a below par finish 6.6L at Royal Randwick F&M Bm78 over 1200m. Is a first-up winner.

Stalked the speed, under the whip to make ground struggling into fifth 4.6L at Southside Cranbourne Bm78 over 1000m. Top win to reel in the leaders from midfield 1.7L at Albury Flat Knacker 94 over 900m Soft 6.
Edged out rivals to win after sitting on pace 0.6L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1000m. Pounced on the lead on the line but just lost when second 0.2L at Muswellbrook Skellatar Bm92 over 1000m Soft 5.

Sat on pace and kicked away with 63kgs 1.4L at Muswellbrook Skel Prel over 900m. Wide  no cover, looped field, got head down when mattered 0.2L at Muswellbrook Skellatar Bm92  over 1000m. Looks to be going well, right in this.

Led at controlled tempo, just found wanting last 100m 2.4L at Flemington 3Y-Qlty over  1100m. Wrong part of the track second up, forgive 3.4L at Flemington Bm78 over 1100m  Heavy 8. Back to the 1000m is key for him, expect a bold showing.

Lobbed midfield and couldn't improve from there to settle on sixth 4.1L at Rosehill Gardens 4Y+ Bm78 over 1100m Heavy 8. Positioned midfield and had chance to run on but ultimately outclassed 4.3L at Caulfield Bm70 over 1000m. Is a first-up winner.

Reeled in quickly for sixth after having the early lead 6.7L at Canterbury Park F&M Bm72 over 1100m. Had the run of race behind the leaders and just missed for second 0.3L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1000m Soft 5. Second-up.

Challenged for the lead but held rivals at bay to win 0.8L at Canterbury Park 3&4Y Bm64 over 1100m Soft 5. Ridden just off the speed and produced best late to finish runner-up 0.6L at Rosehill Gardens 3Y Bm72 over 1100m Heavy 8.

Tenacious run after going forward in transit and nice effort to hold third 1.5L at Gosford Bm64 over 1100m Soft 5. Applied pressure to the leader but had nothing left at the finish, fifth 2.4L at Gosford Cg&E Bm64 over 1200m.

6.comments: Made no headway on the leaders when sixth after sitting midfield 6.8L at Royal Randwick Bm88 over 2000m. Did make up some ground in the straight for fifth but never threatened 2.3L at Hawkesbury Bm78 over 1300m. Can improve second-up.
Fourth 8.3L Cumberland Lodg Group 3 over 2414m Soft. No match for rivals and was always out the back chasing 8.2L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1400m Soft 6.

Stormed home from well back for third in a very encouraging effort 1.7L Aspiration Group 3 over 1600m. Great gallop to fly late for second after getting back in the run 2L Epona Group 3 over 1900m. Well suited after good G3 runs last two.
Beaten for speed and never came into contention 4.1L Wenonagirl Group 3 over 1200m. Never a threat after showing no early speed from the barriers 8.7L at Rosehill Gardens Bm88 over 1400m Soft 6.
Seventh 4.5L Irish Derby Group 1 over 2414m. Seventh 8.5L Grt Voltigeur Group 2 over 2414m. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade. Local debut for European import who is a previous G3 winner.

Too far back in the running to be a serious threat 4L Aspiration Group 3 over 1600m. Trailed the leaders midfield however never improved thereon sixth 4.2L Epona Group 3 over 1900m Soft 6. Back down from G3 company last time.

Sat just behind the leaders and held on to win 0.3L at Gold Coast Gc Mayors Vase over 2050m. One to follow after growing wings late and should be winning soon 0.8L at Muswellbrook Mwbk Cup over 1500m Soft 5. At his best trip second-up.

Could only battle the race out for fourth after holding that position in-running 4.7L at Randwick Bm88 over 2000m Soft 6. Raced up on the pace but capitulated when the pressure was on 6.3L Albury Cup Listed over 2000m Soft 6. Easier here.

Restrained back to midfield always under the pump to run on 6.3L Canb Cup Listed over 2000m Soft 7. Ran on ok late but gave leaders a big head start 5.2L Albury Cup Listed over 2000m Soft 6. Hard fit now and likes this distance.

Went forward to sit just off the leaders but served up a below par finish 6.3L Geel Cup Group 3 over 2400m Soft 7. Raced back, held ground late, well beaten 10.4L at Flemington Bm96 over 2800m Soft 5.

Won after sitting on the pace and getting the advantage late 0L at Caulfield Bm84 over 2400m Soft 6. Handy enough, giving ground a long way from home 14.4L Pakenham Cup Listed over 2500m.Prefer second-up.

Led the field at the 400m but couldn't sustain that thrust 2.1L Canb Cup Listed over 2000m Soft 7. Positioned midfield and had chance to run on but ultimately outclassed 5.7L Albury Cup Listed over 2000m Soft 6. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

Hardly sighted until very late gaining sixth 5.4L at Royal Randwick Bm88 over 2000m Soft 6. Positioned ready to pounce and took over late for an easy win 1.6L at Kensington Bm78 over 1800m Soft 7. Stepping up in grade off a big win.

Tenacious run for third after going forward in transit 2.1L Epona Group 3 over 1900m. Big effort to finish the race off hard into third place when just miss 0.7L at Eagle Farm Bm80 over 2200m. Just behind POLYMNIA in the Epona. Can include.

7.comments: Led, fought on strongly but was nailed on the line into second 0.2L at Muswellbrook Cup  over 1500m. Chased the speed, outclassed at that level 9.4L Doncaster G1 over 1600m.  Hard fit, looks to get control and should be hard to run down.

Never a threat after showing no early speed from the barriers 6.4L Geo Ryder Group 1 over 1500m Soft 5. One-paced to the line and always well back 10.3L Doncaster Group 1 over 1600m Soft 7. Likely to benefit from the drop in grade.

Positioned behind the front-runners and fought off challengers to win 0.2L Ajax Group 2 over 1500m. Too far back in the running to be a serious threat 12.6L Doncaster Group 1 over 1600m Soft 7. Down in grade here so don't dismiss.

Landed in a nice trailing position but couldn't go on to challenge when fifth 5.2L Northerly Group 1 over 1800m. Saved best part of the race until very late 2.1L at Aquis Park Gold Coast Mm Cup Restricted Listed over 1400m. Has won first-up, consider.

Midfield, loomed up, tank soon empty 3.3L Tails Stakes Listed over 1500m Soft 5. Nice ride to sit poised to bounce on the leaders but could only trail into third 2L at Aquis Park Gold Coast The Wave Wfa over 1800m.

Trailed winner, off bit early, plain 10.6L Rosehill Cup Group 3 over 2000m Soft 7. Just off the leaders at the 400m however couldn't make up ground from sixth 3L Beauford Listed over 2300m. Like chances back to this level.
3rd the rail, kept rolling, run ended 200m out 3.2L Five Diamonds Listed over 1800m. Back, well held 8L Festival Group 3 over 1500m. Has won first-up, consider.

One out one back, loomed large, found one better 3.1L at Toowoomba Twba Cup over 2000m. Sent forward and gave backers a sight before weakening into sixth 1.7L at Doomben Hcp over 1600m. Is a first-up winner.

Got run off his feet fresh and was sent for a freshen 14.8L Liverpool G3 over 1300m Soft 5.  His work to the post in recent trials has been very good, 1500m fresh seems to suit and the  ultimate gear change could be the making of this horse.
Chimed in at the right rime for a strong victory 0.8L at Canberra Open over 1400m Soft 6. Restrained back to midfield always under the pump to run on 3.4L at Royal Randwick Bm100 over 1400m.

Arrogant win when looping the field to score easily 0.7L at Newcastle Wldcard over 1400m.  Got the right gaps and burst clear, super win 3L at Randwick Prov-Mid Champs over 1400m.  Clearly going well and capable of making it three in a row.
Back, no impact 8.4L Festival Group 3 over 1500m. Had no pace early but once balanced up ran on well for fifth 2.2L St Kingdom Group 3 over 1200m Soft 6. Is a second-up winner.

Did pass a few tired horses but ultimately left run too late 3.2L Coolmore Group 1 over 1500m. Did make up some ground in the straight for fifth but never threatened 2.4L Emancipatn Group 2 over 1500m Soft 6. Should find this easier.
Super job to make up many lengths from back in the field late for fifth 1.5L at Caulfield Bm96 over 1200m. Saved best part of the race until very late 2.7L at Caulfield Bm84 over 1400m.

Won after sitting on the pace and getting the advantage late 0.9L at Wyong Bm78 over 1350m Soft 6. Won after sitting on the pace and getting the advantage late 0.9L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1400m Soft 5.

8.comments: Eye-catching last 400m for second after allowed to settle back 1.5L at Sportsbet Sandown Lakeside Bm70 over 1400m Soft 5. Under hard riding to make ground from midfield when settled on sixth 4.3L at Caulfield Bm74 over 1600m Soft 7.

Settled a long way back in transit displaying best work very late for fifth 3L at Royal Randwick Bm78 over 2000m. Nice ride to sit behind the speed and once clear finished off hard to win 1.6L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 2400m Heavy 8.

Settled on pace and proved far too good winning 2.8L at Armidale Armidale Cup 94 over 1400m. Couldn't muster a sprint in the straight after camping behind the leaders 4.5L at Muswellbrook Mwbk Cup over 1500m. Have to forgive last start.

Showed best work late when the race was over 2.2L at Kensington Bm78 over 1550m Soft 7. Outside the pace and shot clear over final stages to win 1.7L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1600m. Big win in similar race last time. Poor gate the issue.

Sent forward into a handy spot but succumbed over the final stages when fifth 4.8L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1400m. Ran on nicely over the concluding stages to win 0.8L at Kensington 3Y Bm72 over 1400m Soft 7. Looks ready for the mile.

Positioned well back in transit and flew home for a superb win 0.4L at Dubbo Wra Champ over 1400m. Encouraging effort to make up so much ground after giving away a big start 2.7L at Royal Randwick Ctry Champ over 1400m Soft 7.

Caught the eye running on late from well back to gain second 1.6L at Rosehill Gardens 4Y+ Bm78 over 2000m. Had chance to gain victory but finished second after settling on the pace 0.3L at Royal Randwick Bm78(77) over 2400m.

Still beaten easily but last part was encouraging for sixth after getting well back 5.4L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1400m Soft 6. Settled worse than midfield and from that point struggled into sixth 4.3L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1400m Soft 5.
Controlled the race from the front and won easily 2.3L at Nowra Cl1-Sw over 2200m. Held spot to the line for fifth and never a winning chance 8.1L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 2400m.

Fought hard over the final stages to hold third after sitting behind leaders 0.1L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 2110m. Never in contention after settling a long way back 14.8L at Canterbury Park Bm72 over 1550m Soft 6. Can improve second-up.

Authoritative performance thrashing rivals after sitting just off the pace 2.5L at Rosehill Bm78 over 2400m. Loomed as the winner and got to the lead when it mattered most 0.2L at Rosehill Bm78 (73) over 2400m. Prefer over longer trips.
Fifth 6.3L Geoffrey Freer Group 3 over 2715m. Beaten into fifth 15.3L Godolphin Stks Listed over 2414m. European import probably needing further later on.

Looked a chance after leading but weakened late for fourth 1.4L at Rosehill Gardens Bm78 over 1800m. Raced up on the pace but capitulated when the pressure was on 5.7L at Hawkesbury Bm78 over 1300m. Can improve second-up.

Ridden off the speed but produced best over the concluding stages when second 2L at Wyong Bm88 over 2100m. Settled on the speed and tried very hard but found a couple better finishing third 1.4L at Randwick Bm88 over 2000m. Well placed.

Settled a long way back and grew wings late to just miss out on the major prize 0.6L at Gold Coast Military Rose over 1200m Soft 7. Saved best part of the race until very late 1.2L at Doomben Hcp over 1350m. Up to her best trip now.

No match for the winner but fought on boldly to hold third 1.4L at Royal Randwick Midway Bm72 over 1600m. Just off the speed to contend but was easily defeated once asked for the effort 4.6L at Warwick Farm Bm78 over 1400m Soft 5.
Settled midfield not far off the leaders but couldn't make ground 4.4L at Kembla Grange Bm78 over 2000m Soft 7. Disappointing performance when never got warm 5L at Hawkesbury Bm78 over 1300m.

Awesome effort to run on late for sixth after settling a long way in the running 1.3L at Kembla Grange Provmid Champ over 1400m. Ran on nicely over the concluding stages to win 0.9L at Warwick Farm Bm72 over 1600m. Likely to get well back.

Determined win after sitting close to the lead in transit 0.9L at Canterbury Park Bm72 over 1900m. Fought hard over the final stages for third after sitting behind leaders 1.3L at Hawkesbury 3&4Y Bm72 over 1500m. Second-up.
